body.div:
sequenceDiagram participant Client participant Gateway participant Redis participant Index participant Cosmos participant Connector participant Source
Client->>Gateway: Request context Gateway->>Redis: Cache lookup alt cache hit Redis-->>Gateway: cached bundle Gateway-->>Client: return else cache miss Gateway->>Index: resolve request Index->>Cosmos: vector search Cosmos-->>Index: source pointers Index->>Connector: fetch source Connector->>Source: retrieve content Source-->>Connector: content Connector-->>Index: normalized content Index-->>Gateway: assembled bundle Gateway-->>Client: return bundle end
